                  Job Post Details

                  PHP Developer – PHP, JavaScript, JSON - job post

                  AceOne Technologies
                  Jonesboro, AR 72401
                  You must create an Indeed account before continuing to the company website to apply

                  Full job description

                  Join the fastest-growing technology services company in Jonesboro, AR. To meet our growth sprout, we are looking for our next member(s) of the A-team (Team AceOne). At AceOne, things move quickly around here. At Internet speed. We try to be nimble in how we work and how we hire. We are looking for the next champion coder. If you think you have got what it takes, please send your resume to info@aceonetechnologies.com.


                  Compensation: Excellent Salary, Health benefits, great perks, great working environment etc

                  If you are a PHP “LAMP” Developer with 1 year+ experience, please apply! We are seeking PHP & MySQL Developer(s) to assist web designers in the creation and maintenance of web sites and custom software for our clients. Projects may include building and editing existing websites, creating new websites, developing and writing JavaScript, database engineering etc

                  Qualified candidates need:
                  – 1+ years experience with PHP
                  – 2+ years in the IT industry and a good understanding of the full life cycle of development
                  – 2+ years of hands-on experience in programming database-driven web sites in technologies
                  – Experience with frameworks such as CodeIgniter or Laravel etc
                  – Experience with Javascript, JSON, and Ajax
                  – Experience with Javascript frameworks such as JQuery or Prototype
                  – Experience with MySQL database
                  – Strong understanding of HTML / XHTML
                  – Very strong CSS knowledge
                  – Knowledge of Unix / Linux system administration
                  – Experience with MySQL administration/optimization
                  – Excellent problem solver

                  Email your resumes to info@aceonetechnologies.com
